body:
@sepo-agent implement this sandbox auto-PR verification task.

Goal: prove the Sepo Agent can automatically create a pull request after implementing a small change.

Change requested:
- Add a new markdown file at `docs/auto-pr-smoke.md`.
- The file should contain a short heading and 4-6 bullet points explaining that auto PR creation is now enabled for this sandbox.
- Do not change workflows, configuration, package dependencies, secrets, or production behavior.

Acceptance:
- One new markdown file only.
- The Agent / Implement workflow should create the pull request automatically; no manual `gh pr create` fallback.

comments.body:
**Sepo implementation finished**

- Branch: `agent/implement-issue-14/codex-26274659369`
- Pull request: https://github.com/miluan1995/sepo-sandbox/pull/15

Added `docs/auto-pr-smoke.md` with a short heading and five bullets documenting that Sepo Agent auto PR creation is enabled for this sandbox. Verification: `git status --short --untracked-files=all` and `git ls-files --others --exclude-standard` both showed only `docs/auto-pr-smoke.md`; `wc -l docs/auto-pr-smoke.md` reported 7 lines.

title: Sepo live smoke: auto PR creation
